title: Add --time to podman stop
body:
Adding --time option to podman stop for compatibilty reasons.  The option
is not documented and also hidden from podman stop --help. If this option
is provided, it overrides --timeout.

Resolves issue #366

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: Wouldn't it be simpler to make `--time` an alias for `--timeout`?
aliases dont exist on the flag level.  whats your idea?
Urfave/cli allows multiple names for the same flag, comma separated
indeed it does, but then it shows up in help ... and therefore should be documented ....
I'd prefer documenting it in the manpages as an alternate option name to the code complexity of having an undocumented flag that overrides one of our existing flags
